objectives.name: Craft a Silent Gear Iron Pickaxe

title: Iron at Last!
description:
With the Silent Gear Anvil built, you can finally mine §liron ore§r and craft §lSilent Gear§r tools.

Silent Gear is a modular system:
• You craft §ltool rods§r (handle), §lpickaxe heads§r (tip), and other parts
• Combine them at the anvil to create a complete tool
• Different materials give different stats, traits, and harvest levels
• You can repair, upgrade, and swap parts later

Start with iron — it's your first real mining tier. From here, the world opens up:
• §lSophisticated Storage§r iron chests
• §lSophisticated Backpacks§r upgrades
• §lGliders§r for exploration
• And eventually: §lautomation§r on a massive scale

Overgeared has served its purpose. Welcome to the industrial age.
